headline: Are You Looking for a High-Growth Dividend Stock?
summary: Dividends are one of the best benefits to being a shareholder, but finding a great dividend stock is no easy task. Does Invesco (IVZ) have what it takes? Let's find out.

headline: Invesco (IVZ) Stock Looks Below Fair Value Despite Mixed Signals
summary: After a strong three year run, Invesco stock now sits at a point where its valuation signals are pulling in different directions, with the Excess Returns intrinsic value estimate suggesting the shares trade at a discount while simple market multiples look closer to fair value. Invesco has returned 82.2% over the past three years, which puts more pressure on today’s valuation to be supported by future cash flows rather than past share price gains.
